reviews.review_description: this game is pretty good but i rarely get into lobbies with people

Now I am an admin for this game, but i want to just vent about this game a little bit. 

1: Toxic Community: The players in this game are extremely toxic. In fact, most people change their names to slurs and most people will shout the n word. This game NEEDS filtering.

2: Lack of Effort: The game is really low quality, the monsters dont have AI, and they just charge at you like a 4 year old toddler. The models are decent, but the cosmetics arent as good. It looks like they took 30 seconds to make, and they sell this for a dollar!? Nobody wants to give up a dollar for a low quality bonk hammer that doesnt work.

3: Admin Abuse: The admins in this game are terrible, often abusing the kick hammer to kick innocent people from the game, over, and over again.

4: Lack of Updates: Explains itself. The owner doesn't update this game, like, at all.. And when he does, the updates are pretty bad, the new level updates are cool, and i liked the cosmetic and currency update, but when it comes to other updates, they either add 1 feature or remove 5 features.

5: Lack of Music: There WAS only 1 soundtrack in the game (by me.) It was the forest soundtrack, but now, forest has been removed! No music at all then! So its just a silent, full of kids screaming the n word game.

I Met￼ the owner of the game he’s very nice he scared me with the Sound board the game ￼￼it’s fun because people are nice no toxic people play this game but a mod is not nice he said I’m hacking but my internet was bad so he said shut your a$$ up 😢😢

developer_response.body: hello sorry for hear that we are very sorry(

reviews.review_description: Literally no effort or thought put into this game, just a cash grab that I can guarantee will get no money. 1 level with no escape, a monster with no ai and just charges you which a toddler can do. A short "parkour thing" when it's just 6 trees in an empty room. Doesn't even deserve a backrooms title, it's just a room with no escape. Then a sad lobby, that wants u to pay a dollar for a hat that took two seconds to make. It's absolutely horrible and the 5 star reviews are probably 3 separate accounts from him and I can GUARANTEE that they are fake because there is NO CONTENT AT ALL in this game and the reviews don't say anything so all in all this game is a lazy cash grab that is less entertaining then staring at a wall. However, it is still early in development, but I wouldn't invest till I see some actual content.

developer_response.body: Hello we are sorry for hear that the game is still in construction we trying to make this game better if you wanna you can type in emailtickets@wardy-backrooms.p.tawk.email to say what we should add in game
